title: 2 Amazing Peony Pink in 17cm grower's Pot Fantastic Blooms Easy to Grow Beautiful Garden
features: You are welcome to buy 1 or 2 pot(s) of White Lily in 17cm grower's pot.
An amazing Peony with rounded blooms of deep apple blossom pink and a sweet fragrance.

Freely produced side buds extend the flowering period so that this charming peony may still be in flower right at the end of June. It has a short dense bushy habit with good foliage and will grow to a height of around 90cms (3ft)

Peony common name Paeonia albiflora Pall. Paeonia lactiflora (Chinese peony, Chinese herbaceous peony, or common garden peony) is a species of herbaceous perennial flowering plant in the family Paeoniaceae, native to central and eastern Asia from eastern Tibet across northern China to eastern Siberia.
description: The most spectacular Peony available. Breath-taking and fragrant giant triple layered blooms are produced in early summer. The silky ruffled layers alternate from dusky pink at the edge and centre and creamy apricot blushed white in between. fine sturdy stems. The dense green foliage turns red in the autumn. A florists dream, the peony brings unrivalled beauty and fragrance to a summer border. First grade loose rooted plants supplied. You can also fill your home with these elegant blooms and create cut flower displays where you can enjoy their fragrance indoors. First grade loose rooted plants supplied.
